title: struthanthus marginatus
intro: Struthanthus marginatus, also known as the "Mistletouch" or "Mistletoe", is a parasitic flowering plant that grows on various tree species, obtaining its nutrients by connecting to the host plant's vascular system. Traditionally, it has been used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma, due to its expectorant and anti-inflammatory properties. The health benefits of Struthanthus marginatus include reducing stress and anxiety, improving sleep quality, and alleviating symptoms of menopausal hot flashes. Herbal preparations of Struthanthus marginatus typically involve drying and processing the leaves and stems, which can be made into teas, tinctures, or infusions for medicinal use.
